sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2023-03-15');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE '2023-12-01' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT month(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, month(event_date) AS month_num FROM test_dates;
